WCAG 4.1.3: Status Messages via Live Regions

✓ Good: Polite Live Region with aria-atomic

Form submitted successfully.

✓ Good: Assertive Live Region (Urgent Alert)

Ready for input.

✗ Bad: Invalid aria-live value

This live region has an invalid aria-live value.

✗ Bad: Typo in aria-live

Polite region with typo in aria-live.

⚠ Warning: Missing aria-atomic

Form validation: Error: Email field is required

✓ Good: aria-live="off" (disabled)

This region is intentionally not announced to screen readers.

✗ Bad: Invalid value 'silent'

Trying to silence announcements with invalid value.

Test Results Summary

  • CONFIRMED violations: 3 (invalid values: "quickly", "poliet", "silent")
  • POSSIBLE issues: 1 (missing aria-atomic on multi-part message)
  • GOOD patterns: 3 (polite with atomic, assertive with atomic, off)
